values: Raw idea: Redirect Manager — Sitecore Marketplace client-side app with three extension points (Context Panel, Dashboard Widget per site, Full Page) for CRUD over Redirect Map items at /sitecore/content/{COLLECTION}/{SITE}/Settings/Redirects/* via Authoring GraphQL, with import/export and hybrid usage analytics.
Reference screenshots: Redirect Map item form fields — Type (Server Transfer / 301 / 302 / 307), Preserve QS, Preserve Language, Mapping (regex source -> target rows), Include virtual folder.

stage_history.notes: 67 tasks across 10 epics (A-J). Sub-agent hit usage limit on the manifest-write step; manifest finalized by Team Lead post-recovery.

In-place enrichment: § 9 TDD contract (9.1-9.11) + § 10 per-task specs (~110 RED test cases). 12 assumed-shape annotations lifted into divergence-detection coverage. smoke_outcomes initialized to all pending. task_breakdown_style confirmed tdd.

Tranche 1 — T001-T007 + T062 skeleton. Scaffold via shadcn@latest add quickstart-with-client-side-xmc.json succeeded (Next 16.1.7 + Turbopack, 5 static routes). 32 Blok primitives installed. 3 extension routes + root notFound() per ADR-0011. Theme: dark-mode --primary-foreground override carried into both .dark and @media blocks. Lint: 0 errors / 2 baseline warnings. Build: PASS. Tests: 10 passing + 5 it.todo placeholders (T062 final lands in Tranche 8). Surprises captured: (a) @blok/dropdown does not exist in registry, correct slug is @blok/dropdown-menu — task breakdown § 4c-3 fixed; (b) Blok Nova preset uses .dark class only, no @media block; (c) @blok/draggable's dnd-context.tsx has react-hooks/set-state-in-effect lint suppression as a Blok-component-drift workaround — friction to flag at /code-review.

Tranche 2 — T008-T015 (SDK plumbing). All 9 SDK call wrappers built under lib/sdk/: sites.ts, redirects-read.ts, redirects-write.ts (3 mutations), page-context.ts, application-context.ts, canvas-reload.ts, require-context-id.ts. T008 Provider verified. T016 lib/domain/types.ts created early as a stub (Tranche 3 completes) — needed by T011/T012 for RedirectMapItem import. 9 assumed-shape fixtures landed in tests/fixtures/graphql/. 34 new RED tests (49 total now passing). SDK boundary lock structural test active and PASSING — caught and correctly excluded the scaffold's components/examples/ tree. Divergence-detection [redirect-manager:dev:capture] logs in T012/T013/T014, all gated on NODE_ENV != production. Lint 0 errors / 2 baseline warnings. Build PASS. Surprises: (a) pages.context subscribe pattern uses Path A (subscribe-via-query); the onSuccess callback receives PagesContext directly with no .data envelope — verified against sdk-types.d.ts; (b) Authoring.GraphqlData type requires url: '/graphql' literal, wrapper uses 'as never' cast on the options object (matches sibling-app pattern); (c) scaffold-example boundary hit — components/examples/built-in-auth/with-xmc/list-languages.tsx imports xmc directly; SDK boundary scan now excludes examples/ since scaffold examples are not production code. CAPTURE GATE NEXT: operator boots in real Cloud Portal Test App, watches console for [redirect-manager:dev:capture] logs covering pageInfo.url/route/path, sites/collections shapes, application-context tenantId/contextId; any divergence → fixture replacement + RED-test re-run.

Tranche 5 — T035-T040 Full Page read paths. Replaced the /full-page CaptureHelper UI with the real Operator Console (v1) admin surface. 6 new components under components/full-page/: FullPage (two-pane orchestrator with 960px tabbed fallback), CollectionPicker (T036), SitePicker (T037 — filtered by collectionId), RedirectMapList (T038 — react-virtuoso virtualized + 2px primary left-edge selection stripe), RedirectMapDetail (T039 — read-only detail with flag chips only-when-true, mappings table mono font, no edit/delete buttons in Tranche 5 — those land in Tranche 6), TopActionRow (T040 — Breadcrumb + Import/Export/+New stubs marked TODO Tranche 6/7). components/dev/capture-helper.tsx DELETED — no remaining route uses it. lib/sdk/types.ts gained a Sites re-export so components don't import @sitecore-marketplace-sdk/xmc directly. OQ-7 still hardcoded: sitePath built as /sitecore/content/{collection.name}/{site.name}/Settings/Redirects — Tranche 6 capture may refine. 4 Blok API surprises caught at build: Alert variant=danger (not destructive), Badge colorScheme (not variant), Sites.SiteCollection.id is string|null|undefined required ?? '' guards, displayName vs name distinction matters for tests. Tabbed fallback at <960px via window.innerWidth+resize listener (jsdom-friendly). Lint 0/2 baseline; build PASS; tests 236 passing + 2 it.todo across 32 test files (was 200+2 / 26 files in Tranche 4 fixup — added 36 new tests).

Tranche 4 — T022-T034 Context Panel + Dashboard Widget. Replaced the Tranche 2 capture-helper UIs on /context-panel and /dashboard-widget with the real Operator Console (v1) UI. /full-page still uses CaptureHelper (Tranche 5 territory). New components: context-panel/{ContextPanel,RegexBanner,MatchedMapGroup,InlineEditForm,AddRedirectModal}.tsx + dashboard-widget/{DashboardWidget,StatTile}.tsx. Context Panel uses pageInfo.route as matcher key (OQ-A closed). Dashboard Widget aggregateStats(): total maps, total mappings (sum of mappings.length), max __Updated formatted via parseSitecoreCompactDate + Intl.DateTimeFormat. lib/sdk/types.ts added as a clean re-export of ClientSDK so components don't import the SDK package directly (SDK boundary). Two structural guards turned from it.todo to real assertions (three-routes + dark-mode --primary-foreground override). Two remaining it.todo (raw-HTML injection + outline-none) stay for Tranche 8. OQ-7 OPEN: Dashboard Widget site path hardcodes collection name 'solo' with TODO; appName from appCtx used as siteName; both flagged for Tranche 6 capture. Context Panel write paths (create/edit/delete) wired through lib/sdk/redirects-write.ts but UNTESTED against real tenant — assumed-shape comments mark each write call site. State coverage complete (default/loading/empty/error/focus/success-toast) per POC. Accessibility: axe-core + focus-visible + sr-only live regions. Fixes: useEffect→IIFE for react-hooks/set-state-in-effect; Button colorScheme='danger' (no destructive variant in Blok). Test count: 200 passing + 2 it.todo (was 144+4 in Tranche 3). 26 test files (up from 19).

Tranche 3 — T016-T021 domain layer. 8 new modules under lib/{domain,url-mapping,import-export,match,redirects}/. parseSitecoreCompactDate handles yyyyMMddTHHmmssZ (captured __Updated format). UrlMapping parse/serialize per ADR-0008 with fast-check property tests (3 invariants × 100 iterations = 300 property-test runs + 7 concrete cases + the captured fixture %2ftest=%2FnewTest&%2fhello=%2Fworld). Zod v4 schema for redirect-manager/v1 (T019). GUID-keyed diff classifier per ADR-0009. Exact-string Context Panel matcher per ADR-0005. RedirectType enum with introspection-fallback shape (T021 — 301/302/307 names still UNVERIFIED, Tranche 6). redirects-read.ts and redirects-write.ts updated to import canonical parse/serialize (inline copies removed). Lint 0/2 baseline; build PASS; tests 144 passing + 4 it.todo (was 50+4 — added 94 new tests). Surprises: Zod v4 errorMap renamed to error+check; fast-check hex-case test relaxed to letter-only check. No real-tenant interaction required for Tranche 3 — domain layer is pure modules.

Capture Point #1 closed. Captured fixtures for application-context, page-context, sites-list, collections-list, redirect-map-list from real tenant xmc-sitecoresaa516c-chahdevexjoee24-proda41d.sitecorecloud.io. THREE major contract corrections landed: (1) Marketplace SDK envelope for client.mutate('xmc.authoring.graphql') — body MUST be INSIDE params, not at top level; the `as never` cast was hiding a real type error. Wrong shape sends malformed request, gateway returns HTTP 400 with empty body. (2) Module-key mutations are DOUBLE-unwrap (result.data.data), NOT single — previous skill docs and sibling apps (last-edit-trail, component-usage-atlas) were wrong. Updated both sitecore:marketplace-sdk-client § 8b + sitecore:marketplace-sdk-xmc § 3 + response-unwrap-matrix.md reference. (3) OQ-A CLOSED: Context Panel matcher key is pageInfo.route (clean published path '/'), NOT pageInfo.url ('/?sc_site=solo-website' — includes sc_site qs). Other findings: requireContextId now checks both appCtx.resourceAccess AND appCtx.resources (deprecated field, what this tenant returns). Boolean fields serialize as '1' (true) / '' (false) on read surface. __Updated field uses Sitecore compact format yyyyMMddTHHmmssZ not ISO-8601 — Tranche 3 will parse. Lighter GraphQL query: aliased Item.field(name:) accessors instead of fields(...) connection — ~75% smaller response. Added components/dev/capture-helper.tsx as a temporary Tranche 2 capture UI (replaced by real surface UI in Tranche 4+). All 12 assumed-shape annotations: 5 captured (page-context, application-context, sites-list, collections-list, redirect-map-list), 7 still PENDING for Tranche 6 (write surface — create/update/delete + redirect-type-enum non-ServerTransfer values + boolean write rep + createItem caller-supplied id). 2 new memory entries saved: reference_marketplace_sdk_envelope_authoring_graphql.md + reference_sitecore_field_aliased_accessor_query_pattern.md. 50 tests passing + 4 it.todo (was 49). Lint + build clean.

notes: Greenfield concept brief generated 2026-05-09 via /rubber-ducky.
Three Marketplace extension points (Context Panel, Dashboard Widget, Full Page) sharing Authoring GraphQL as single canonical data source.
PRD-000 MVP is en-language-only and pure CRUD — multilingual, analytics, sync-back, concurrent-edit detection are all deferred to follow-on PRDs (revised 2026-05-09 after PM critical review).
Import matches by Sitecore item GUID (ADR-0009); JSON includes the GUID for every item.
Import has 3 actions only: create / overwrite / skip. The merge action was collapsed into overwrite during critical review (Q-CR-1).

Real-tenant Authoring/Preview GraphQL response shape captured during PM critical-review answers — fields are { name, jsonValue } array; UrlMapping is URL-encoded source=target pairs joined by '&'; RedirectType enum has 'ServerTransfer' confirmed plus 301/302/307 names TBV.
discovery_level: standard
discovery_summary: confirmed
critical_review: completed
critical_review_level: standard
sitecore_discovery: completed
sdk_surface_split: n/a (2 new SDK surfaces: xmc.authoring.graphql + xmc.sites — below 3-surface threshold)
base_branch: main (PRD-000, no predecessor)

Architecture (2026-05-10): extension-point identifiers locked to xmc:pages:contextpanel /context-panel, xmc:dashboardblocks /dashboard-widget, xmc:fullscreen /full-page. Root / returns notFound() per provider-trap mitigation. 3 new ADRs added (0011-0013). Below ADR-density gate.

Architecture (2026-05-10): OQ-1 RESOLVED — wrapper is xmc.sites.listSites (verified from .d.ts). OQ-3 promoted to OQ-A (which PagesContext field is matcher key). Two new sub-OQs added: OQ-B (createItem accepts caller-supplied id?), OQ-C (boolean field repr on writes).

Architecture (2026-05-10): CAPTURE PENDING list — page-context.json, sites-list.json, collections-list.json, application-context.json, redirect-type-enum.json, template-id.json, create.json, update.json, delete.json. Real-tenant paired-session capture required before /task-breakdown opens (ADR-0013).

UI design (2026-05-10): 3 variants produced (v1 Operator Console, v2 Editor's Studio, v3 Site Atlas). 3 POC clickdummies produced. Stakeholder selected v1. Two post-selection fixes applied: (a) dark-mode --primary-foreground contrast fix (white-on-lavender bug from Nova preset/sibling globals.css inherited as override-to-dark-tone), (b) per-page Light/Dark/System theme toggle injected via theme-toggle.js. Both folded into v1 spec § 7.

ADR-0013 revised 2026-05-10 from hard pre-/task-breakdown gate to progressive learning loop. Operator chose to proceed with assumed shapes (sourced from PRD § 9 captured Authoring read shape + Sitecore plugin skill docs + sibling-app evidence in last-edit-trail and component-usage-atlas). Divergences will be captured-and-fixed as they surface during /implement and /test. Paired-session capture remains available on-demand.

SDK Sandbox idea filed in storage/marketplace-app-ideas.md (2026-05-10) as the long-term answer to the architecture-stage capture friction. Once shipped, Sandbox replaces the paired-session protocol with self-service capture.

Next: /task-breakdown immediately. Tasks touching unverified shapes are annotated assumed-shape: <fixture-filename>; QA enrichment will list them in § 9 test contract; smoke gates at /test re-run calls against real tenant.
